channel.title: Frontion Geopolitical News
channel.description: Curated geopolitical news headlines from global sources

item.title: 🇨🇴 Colombia Heads to Runoff Election Between Pro-Trump Candidate and Leftist Senator
item.description: Abelardo de la Espriella, a Trump-admiring lawyer promising iron-fisted crime crackdown, will face leftist Iván Cepeda in a June 21 runoff. The election could reshape Colombia-US relations and determine whether the country continues peace talks or shifts to militarized security policies.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israeli Forces Capture Strategic Beaufort Castle in Largest Lebanon Advance in 25 Years
item.description: Israeli troops seized the hilltop Beaufort Castle fortress in southern Lebanon, marking the most significant Israeli advance into Lebanese territory in a quarter century. The strategic position overlooking the Litani River could shift the military balance in the ongoing conflict.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Amending Draft MOU After Trump Toughens US Stance
item.description: Tehran is making changes to the latest draft Memorandum of Understanding aimed at ending the war with the US, according to Irans semi-official Tasnim news agency. The amendments come after Trump took a harder line in negotiations.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan Q1 business investment stalls amid Iran war concerns
item.description: Japanese corporate capital expenditure paused after a year of strong growth as Middle East conflict uncertainty weighs on business confidence, with spending remaining flat in Q1.

item.title: 🇯🇵🇨🇳 Japan rejects Chinese accusations of new militarism
item.description: Defense Minister Shinjiro Koizumi pushed back against Chinas criticism of Japans defense buildup, saying Tokyo is not pursuing militarism while Beijing rapidly arms itself.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China conducts patrols near Scarborough Shoal after Philippines warning
item.description: Chinese military and coast guard carried out patrols near disputed waters in the South China Sea, a day after Manila said it remained under threat from Beijing despite recent US-China tensions easing.

item.title: 🇰🇷🇯🇵 South Korea and Japan discuss military logistics support deal
item.description: Seoul remains cautious about the politically sensitive pact with Tokyo, but both sides are exploring a military-logistics support agreement that would deepen defense cooperation.

item.title: 🇸🇾 Syrias Sharaa holds phone call with Trump, Syrian presidency says
item.description: Syrian President Ahmed al-Sharaa spoke with US President Trump by phone, according to the Syrian presidency, in a potential diplomatic opening between Washington and Damascus.

item.title: ⛪ Moldovan Patriarch steps down amid church leadership dispute
item.description: The patriarch of one of Moldovas two competing Orthodox churches has stepped down, potentially reshaping religious dynamics in the country caught between Romanian and Russian church influences.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Child killed in drone attack on Russian-held Ukraine territory
item.description: A Russia-appointed official reports one child killed and 11 injured in a drone attack on Russian-held territory in eastern Ukraine.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK businesses stay downbeat about economy
item.description: British business confidence remains weak as surveys show continued economic headwinds and uncertainty about growth prospects.

item.title: 💻 Asias AI chip boom could spark regional economic renaissance
item.description: Asia stands to benefit from the global AI chip boom, potentially transforming regional economies and technology supply chains.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Netanyahu taps Arrow-3 innovator as National Security Adviser
item.description: Shmuel Ben-Ezra, who played a key role in developing Israels Arrow-3 missile defense system, has been appointed as national security adviser, bringing deep defense expertise to the role.

item.title: 🇺🇸 US Coast Guard patrols near Scarborough Shoal with Philippine forces
item.description: The US Coast Guard conducted patrols near Scarborough Shoal alongside Philippine forces amid concerns about potential Chinese military build-up in the disputed area.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China cracks down on overseas brokerage investors
item.description: Chinese authorities are cracking down on investors using overseas brokerages for stock trading, part of broader efforts to control capital flows and maintain financial stability.

item.title: 🇬🇧 German FM says Israels advance into southern Lebanon cause for serious concern
item.description: Germanys foreign minister expressed serious concern about Israels military advance into southern Lebanon, calling for restraint amid escalating regional tensions.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran reopens most entrances to 18 underground missile sites struck in war
item.description: Iran has restored access to most of its underground missile facilities that were damaged during the recent conflict, according to reports, signaling continued military readiness.

item.title: 🇪🇺 US castigates Europe over defense spending
item.description: The US continued pressure on European allies to increase defense spending, with NATO simultaneously reassuring Asia-Pacific partners about alliance commitments.

item.title: ⚠️ Pentagon warns US military personnel targeted via location apps
item.description: The Pentagon issued warnings that US military personnel are being targeted through location-based applications, raising concerns about operational security and data privacy.

item.title: 🇧🇾 Russia-Belarus union state agreements advance despite Ukraine war
item.description: Russia and Belarus continue advancing their union state agreements, deepening economic and military integration while both remain engaged in the Ukraine conflict.

item.title: 🇸🇾 Syrian leader Sharaa speaks with Trump by phone
item.description: Syrian President Ahmed al-Sharaa held a phone conversation with US President Trump, marking a potentially significant diplomatic development.

item.title: 🌍 How Trumps Ukraine aid cuts undermine justice for Russian war crimes
item.description: US aid cuts to Ukraine are hampering efforts to document and prosecute Russian war crimes, with investigators struggling to gather evidence under worsening conditions.

item.title: 🇮🇱 German FM calls for Israel to end Lebanon advance
item.description: Germanys foreign minister expressed serious concern about Israels military operations in southern Lebanon, urging restraint in the escalating conflict.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China cracks down on overseas brokerages for stock trading
item.description: Chinese authorities are intensifying a crackdown on investors using overseas brokerages for stock trading, as Beijing tightens control over capital flows.

item.title: 🏛️ Trump claims perfect score on cognitive test
item.description: President Trump claimed he scored perfectly on a cognitive test, using the results to attack political opponents while defending his mental acuity.
